productDisplayName: Fila Men's Universe HI Black Shoe
description: This sleek pair of black high top shoes from the Universe Hi range of fila are designed for utmost comfort and style. Pair them with casual wear like jeans or cargo pants and inkfruit tees and create a stir wherever you go.Uppers Black synthetic uppers with white fabric lining gives great protection and great style White lace-ups ensures a snug Fit Additional pair opf black laces give a different look Graphic of the logo on the side Lightly cushioned insole gives greater comfort Midsole Lightweight midsole for cushioning and shock resistance Outsole fila logo shaped lugs on outsole ensures greater grip and stability Pivot point for greater mobility Toe guard for greater protection Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
